owning_subsystem: ui shell runtime, browser host adapters, and desktop host integration
non_goals: Do not change UI ownership boundaries.
Do not create direct ui -> services coupling.
Do not fork browser and desktop contract models.
Do not perform the Edition 2024 uplift in this phase.
scope_in: Upgrade leptos, leptos_meta, leptos_router, wasm-bindgen, wasm-bindgen-futures, js-sys, web-sys, and coupled helpers as a coordinated UI stack.
Refresh Tauri and plugin crates only if newer stable releases are available and compatible with the existing 2.x host model.
Resolve resulting compile, runtime, and validation regressions while preserving browser and desktop parity.
scope_out: Non-UI runtime and storage major-version upgrades.
acceptance_criteria: The UI Leptos and WASM dependency stack is upgraded to the latest stable 0.8 / current stable browser bindings line at execution time.
cargo xtask verify profile ui passes after the migration.
cargo xtask ui-hardening passes without reintroducing the floating-toolchain finding.
Browser and desktop host checks continue to pass without introducing new architecture-boundary violations.
validation_artifacts: Passing desktop_runtime, site, and desktop_tauri check output
Passing UI verification and hardening output
Committed phase-3 plans and UI dependency updates
rollback_path: Revert the phase-3 UI dependency graph update, lockfile refresh, and UI compatibility fixes together so browser and desktop hosts return to the previous validated stack.
